summary: Any authenticated user can enumerate the full membership roster of any course by calling the member-list endpoints with an arbitrary course_id. This exposes course membership, usernames, display names, user IDs, and course roles without requiring membership in the target course.

evidence_snippets.reason: Both roster endpoints require only authentication and never check that the caller is a member or staff member of the target course.
The repository returns full membership records for the supplied course_id, so the missing authorization check in the controller directly exposes roster data.

root_cause: Course membership listing endpoints are guarded only by a generic login check and do not enforce course membership or staff authorization before exposing roster information.
repair_plan: Require the caller to be at least a member of the target course before listing members, and consider restricting roster access to staff if the roster is intended to be private. Apply a course-bound authorization decorator to both list endpoints and keep returned fields minimal for non-staff users.
